title: Silkeborg, Central Jutland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Silkeborg, Central Jutland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Silkeborg is a city in Central Jutland with a population of 48,000. A lake district city known for its art museum, paper mill history, and the Gudenå River canoeing routes.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
